case_title: MARA CLARISSE FINKELSTEIN VS. TERRY MORGAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINKELSTEIN, MARA CLARISSE AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARD, AKILAH
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 01/14/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF MARA CLARISSE FINKELSTEIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT(S) TERRY MORGAN ET AL ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY FINKELSTEIN, MARA CLARISSE AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, TERRY EDWARD, AKILAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
